rationale: OpenXiangShan Kunminghu V2 is the canonical reference for the BPU topology selected in rtl/cpu/bpu/. The local implementation matches the upstream block diagram (decoupled BPU + FTQ + uFTB + FTB + TAGE-SC + ITTAGE + RAS + loop predictor) and is parameterised to meet or exceed the upstream entry counts. Phone-class MPKI claims remain blocked until SPEC2017 / AOSP / JetStream2 traces are ingested.
fork_policy_reason: Per docs/architecture-optimization/sota-2028/branch-predictors.md, our local SystemVerilog reimplementation matches the Kunminghu BPU topology and uses the same parameter floor. We track upstream by commit pin rather than forking; if a tapeout-quality variant requires divergent block geometry we will re-pin to a project-local fork.

deviations: Per-table TAGE useful-bit reset alternates LSB/MSB on a fixed cycle period (TAGE_USEFUL_RESET_PERIOD = 256K cycles) rather than the adaptive scheme in Kunminghu. Matches the Seznec CBP-5 baseline.
ITTAGE storage uses uniform ITTAGE_ENTRIES_MAX-sized arrays with index hashing modulo the per-table entry count. Synthesised area follows the largest table; KMH packs tables tightly.

Two-taken-per-cycle FTB read is parameterised (MAX_BR_PER_BLOCK = 2) but the prediction pipeline currently only emits one taken branch per cycle. Lifting to two taken requires a follow-up RTL workstream tracked under the claim_policy below.

FDIP-style L1I prefetch is wired through rtl/cpu/bpu/ftq_to_l1i_shim.sv to the cache agent's e1_ftq_to_l1i_pkg::ftq_prefetch_req_t interface. The shim is single-cycle combinational; real timing closure may add a register stage at the cluster boundary.

claim_policy.reason: Open topology is wired in synthesisable SystemVerilog, verilator strict-lint clean across 14 modules, cocotb regression 94/94 target-module tests across 10 modules including the L1I frontend. Workload MPKI claims remain blocked until benchmarks/cpu/branch/ ingests SPEC, AOSP, and JS-engine traces.
